testcase.name: createComponent_superAdminDenied
testcase.displayname: Should deny SUPER_ADMIN from creating component

testcase.name: createComponent_initializeAvailableQuantity
testcase.displayname: Should initialize available quantity equal to total quantity

testcase.name: createComponent_negativeQuantity
testcase.displayname: Should fail when quantity is negative

testcase.name: createComponent_trimName
testcase.displayname: Should trim component name before saving

testcase.name: createComponent_adminDenied
testcase.displayname: Should deny ADMIN from creating component

testcase.name: createComponent_zeroQuantity
testcase.displayname: Should fail when quantity is zero

testcase.name: createComponent_studentDenied
testcase.displayname: Should deny STUDENT from creating component

testcase.name: createComponent_nullUser
testcase.displayname: Should fail when current user is null

testcase.name: createComponent_duplicateName
testcase.displayname: Should fail when component already exists

testcase.name: createComponent_shouldCreateHistory
testcase.failure: ADMIN_001 INS_001 org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <ADMIN_001> but was: <INS_001> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:177) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1145) at com.inventory_service.service.CreateComponentTests.createComponent_shouldCreateHistory(CreateComponentTests.java:459) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)
